headline: Travis Kelce Reserves Seat At Reception For SpongeBob Just In Case

headline: Emma Stone Finally Quits Waiting Tables

headline: Grandma Aired Out In Yard
excerpt: ZANESVILLE, OH—Noting that her stink had begun clinging to furniture, clothes, and anyone who hugged her for more than a couple of seconds, family members of local grandmother Phyllis Hargrave confirmed Thursday that they had set the 89-year-old on a lawn chair in the yard to air her out. “Yeah, Granny was starting to reek, so […] The post Grandma Aired Out In Yard appeared first on The Onion .

headline: Nation Decides Baseball Too Fast Now
excerpt: NEW YORK—Just a few years after Major League Baseball introduced sweeping pace-of-play reforms intended to make the sport more compelling, a stressed-out nation confirmed Thursday that baseball games had now become much too fast. “Jesus Christ, everything’s happening so fast I can’t even keep track of it—let us catch our breath!” Reds fan Aaron Cartwright said […] The post Nation Decides Baseball Too Fast Now appeared first on The Onion .

headline: Drone Network Used To Smuggle Contraband Into Prisons

headline: ‘The Bear’ Ends With Continuous 45-Minute Shot Of Carmy Screaming While Stirring Tomato Sauce
excerpt: CHICAGO—Stunning longtime fans with its climactic conclusion, FX series The Bear reportedly ended Friday with a continuous 45-minute shot of protagonist Carmy screaming while stirring tomato sauce. “After so many tense scenes and multifaceted characters, I’m glad we could provide the perfect finale to this show that I know the fans will love,” said star […] The post ‘The Bear’ Ends With Continuous 45-Minute Shot Of Carmy Screaming While Stirring Tomato Sauce appeared first on The Onion .

headline: Prize Hog Drops Out Of Great American State Fair Due To Event’s Political Nature

headline: German World Cup Fan Can’t Believe How Different Real U.S. Is From Depiction In Pixar’s ‘Cars’
